description_long: This is a slender adult male figure with a lean, muscular build, standing upright with arms relaxed at his sides. He wears loose, cropped pants with a wide waistband and a fitted cap or turban on his head, leaving his upper body bare and exposing defined musculature and a visible ribcage. His facial features are sharp, with a prominent nose, high cheekbones, and a short beard, giving him a distinctive, somewhat aged appearance. The pants are gathered at the ankles, and he is barefoot, with detailed toes and feet. The skin tone is medium to dark, and the overall surface has a matte, slightly rough finish, suggesting a stylized or hand-painted texture. The figure's posture and attire suggest he could be a street performer, laborer, or a character from a historical or cultural urban setting.
description: A lean, shirtless adult male with loose cropped pants, a head covering, and a short beard, standing upright and barefoot. The figure has defined musculature and a stylized, slightly rough surface finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bare chest, defined abs, facial features, and both arms relaxed at the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the curve of the back, and the side seam of the pants.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the bare back, shoulder blades, and the back of the head covering, as well as the gathered ankles of the pants.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the face, chest, and the relaxed arm.
attribute_clothing_type: loose cropped pants and a fitted head covering
attribute_hairstyle: short beard, hair covered by headwear
